products.name: Fresh Oyster Mushrooms
products.description: Premium hand-picked oyster mushrooms, grown locally in controlled environments. Known for their delicate texture and mild, slightly sweet flavor. Perfect for stir-fries, soups, and pasta dishes.
products.shortDescription: Fresh, locally-grown oyster mushrooms with a delicate flavor
products.storageInstructions: Store in refrigerator at 2-4°C. Use within 5-7 days of purchase. Keep in original packaging or paper bag.
products.preparationTips: Gently clean with damp cloth. Trim tough stems. Best when sautéed, grilled, or added to soups and stir-fries.
products.seoTitle: Fresh Oyster Mushrooms - Premium Local Grown | MASH
products.seoDescription: Buy fresh oyster mushrooms grown locally in Pangasinan. Hand-picked daily, organic certified. Perfect for cooking. Order online today!
products.seoKeywords: oyster mushrooms, fresh mushrooms, organic mushrooms, local mushrooms, Philippines

products.name: Premium Dried Shiitake Mushrooms
products.description: Sun-dried shiitake mushrooms with intense umami flavor. Grown in oak logs for authentic taste. Rehydrates perfectly for soups, broths, and Asian cuisine. Long shelf life - perfect for pantry stocking.
products.shortDescription: Premium sun-dried shiitake mushrooms with rich umami flavor
products.storageInstructions: Store in cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Shelf life: 12 months. Keep in airtight container after opening.
products.preparationTips: Soak in warm water for 20-30 minutes before use. Save soaking liquid for flavorful broth. Remove stems if too tough.
products.seoTitle: Premium Dried Shiitake Mushrooms - Authentic Umami | MASH
products.seoDescription: Buy premium dried shiitake mushrooms. Oak log grown, sun-dried for intense flavor. Perfect for Asian cooking. 12-month shelf life.
products.seoKeywords: dried shiitake, shiitake mushrooms, dried mushrooms, umami, asian cooking

products.name: Oyster Mushroom Growing Kit - Beginner Friendly
products.description: Complete mushroom growing kit for home cultivation. Includes pre-inoculated substrate, humidity tent, and detailed instructions. Start harvesting fresh oyster mushrooms in 10-14 days! Perfect for beginners, families, and urban gardeners.
products.shortDescription: Grow your own oyster mushrooms at home in just 10-14 days
products.expectedYield: 300-500g of fresh mushrooms per kit (2-3 flushes)
products.storageInstructions: Store kit in cool place (15-20°C) until ready to use. Begin growing within 2 weeks of receipt for best results.
products.careInstructions: Mist 2-3 times daily. Keep in indirect light. Maintain humidity at 80-90%. Harvest when caps begin to flatten.
products.seoTitle: Oyster Mushroom Growing Kit - Grow Fresh Mushrooms at Home | MASH
products.seoDescription: Beginner-friendly oyster mushroom growing kit. Harvest fresh mushrooms in 10-14 days. Complete kit with instructions. Perfect for home and education.
products.seoKeywords: mushroom growing kit, grow mushrooms, oyster mushroom kit, urban gardening, indoor farming

products.name: Fresh Shiitake Mushrooms
products.description: Premium fresh shiitake mushrooms with rich, earthy flavor. Perfect for soups, stir-fries, and grilling. Known for their meaty texture and immune-boosting properties. Harvested at peak freshness.
products.shortDescription: Fresh shiitake mushrooms with rich, earthy flavor
products.storageInstructions: Refrigerate at 2-4°C. Use within 7 days. Store in paper bag for best results.
products.preparationTips: Remove stems (save for stock). Clean gently with damp cloth. Slice and cook over medium-high heat for best flavor.
products.seoTitle: Fresh Shiitake Mushrooms - Premium Quality | MASH
products.seoDescription: Buy fresh shiitake mushrooms. Rich flavor, meaty texture. Perfect for Asian cooking. Locally grown in Benguet.
products.seoKeywords: fresh shiitake, shiitake mushrooms, fresh mushrooms, local shiitake, Philippines

products.name: Fresh Enoki Mushrooms
products.description: Delicate white enoki mushrooms with a mild, slightly fruity flavor. Perfect for hot pot, soups, salads, and garnishes. Known for their crunchy texture and elegant appearance.
products.shortDescription: Delicate enoki mushrooms perfect for hot pot and soups
products.storageInstructions: Keep refrigerated at 2-4°C. Use within 5 days. Do not wash until ready to use.
products.preparationTips: Trim root cluster. Rinse gently before use. Best when added to soups or stir-fries in final minutes of cooking.
products.seoTitle: Fresh Enoki Mushrooms - Perfect for Hot Pot | MASH
products.seoDescription: Buy fresh enoki mushrooms online. Crunchy texture, mild flavor. Perfect for hot pot, soups, and Asian cuisine.
products.seoKeywords: enoki mushrooms, fresh enoki, hot pot mushrooms, asian mushrooms
